name: kntnt-wp-skills
description: Mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy, or scaffold a brand-new one from nothing. Three user-invoked skills: `clone` creates a fresh local copy of a production site and `pull` refreshes an existing one incrementally, both over one transfer engine reached solely through the Novamira MCP — never over SSH; `mkwp` scaffolds a brand-new local site standalone, with no production involved. Every skill puts every decision to you as a recommendation you accept or override.
